insight_summary: Union Jack Cufflinks is gaining traction with your audience. Post soon with a hook that invites debate or personal reaction.

next_post.hook: I will say what a lot of Brits think about Union Jack Cufflinks but will not post.
next_post.content_idea: Frame it around whether the flag still unites or divides — use one real example from daily British life, then ask viewers which side they are on.
next_post.format: Yes/No debate post with comment-bait question overlay
next_post.reason_it_will_perform_better: This works because it taps into British identity, which consistently drives strong engagement with your audience, and uses a debate format they respond to well.

data_integrity.policy: Only real Google Trends measurements are published. When Trends is unavailable, the last real reading is reused and flagged 'cached' with its measured_at time. No values are ever randomly generated.
